context.testPlanPrompt:
# Test: Rename a task inline

## Setup

Using scenario: `standard`

The user starts on the board page at `/`.

## Steps

1. Locate the card titled "Design landing page" in the "To Do" column
2. hover: over the "Design landing page" card to reveal the "Rename card" button
3. click: the "Rename card" button on the "Design landing page" card
4. assert: an input field containing "Design landing page" is visible
5. type: "Updated landing page design" into the input field
6. click: the "To Do" column header to save the change
7. assert: text "Updated landing page design" is visible on the card
8. assert: the rename input field is no longer visible
9. refresh: the page
10. assert: text "Updated landing page design" is still visible on the card in the "To Do" column

## Expected result

The task is successfully renamed inline and the change persists after a page refresh.
